element.name: TSQLWhereClause
element.short: Modifier for SQL script to add a common WHERE clause filter

element.name: IAudiosSQL.CreateTable
element.short: Returns the SQL statement to create the audio_library table.

element.name: IAudiosSQL
element.short: Interface for audio_library table SQL scripts

element.name: IAudiosSQL.SelectAll
element.short: Returns a SELECT statement for table‑view queries.

descr.p: The WHERE clause is dynamically appended based on the TSQLWhereClause parameter, allowing filtering by ID, active status, marked status, or arbitrary field/value pairs.

element.name: IAudiosSQL.SelectTable
element.short: Returns a SELECT statement for internal table queries.

descr.p: The WHERE clause is dynamically appended based on the TSQLWhereClause parameter, allowing filtering by ID, active status, marked status, or arbitrary field/value pairs.

element.name: IAudiosSQL.Insert
element.short: Returns an INSERT statement for adding a new audio record.

element.name: IAudiosSQL.Update
element.short: Returns an UPDATE statement for modifying an audio record.

element.name: IAudiosSQL.Delete
element.short: Returns a DELETE statement for removing an audio record.
